---
about:
  id: Resume-Main
  template: trestles
  image: Headshot1.png
  image-width: 350px
  image-shape: rounded

format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 0px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem
    max-width: 2000px
---

::: {#Resume-Main}
+:------------------:+:-----------------------------:+:------------------:+
|                    | ## Jonathan Barnes            |                    |
+--------------------+-------------------------------+--------------------+
|                    | **Expertise**                 |                    |
+--------------------+-------------------------------+--------------------+
| Data Visualization | R                             | Data Pipelines     |
+--------------------+-------------------------------+--------------------+
| Data Cleaning      | Programming                   | Data Communication |
+--------------------+-------------------------------+--------------------+

## Relevent Work Experience

### Graduate Research Assistant

### IT
:::

::: {style="justify-content: center; text-align: center;"}
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
|                          | **Proficiencies**      |                            |
+:========================:+:======================:+:==========================:+
| Applied Statistics       | Data Analysis          | Databases                  |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
| Geospatial Visualization | Data Engineering       | Predictive Modeling        |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
| Machine Learning         | Computational Biology  | Differential Gene Analysis |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
| Regression Analysis      | Research Methodologies | Data Privacy               |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
| Project Management       | GIS                    | Technical Writing          |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
|                          | **Languages & Tools**  |                            |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
| R                        | Python                 | Shiny                      |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
| Quarto                   | Markdown               | API's                      |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
| Git                      | Linux                  | Bash                       |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+
| Office                   | PowerShell             | SQL                        |
+--------------------------+------------------------+----------------------------+

+------------+-------------------+-------------------------+---------------------+------------+
|            |                   | **Strengths**           |                     |            |
+:==========:+:=================:+:=======================:+:===================:+:==========:+
| Creativity | Critical Thinking | Complex Problem-solving | Pattern Recognition | Integrity  |
+------------+-------------------+-------------------------+---------------------+------------+

<a href="Resume_JonathanBarnes.pdf" download class="btn btn-secondary"> <i class="bi bi-save"></i> Download Resume </a>
:::
